CAREERS

WORK AT TECKPATH

Help businesses manage, secure, and modernize their technology — with a security-first team that has been serving Canada since 2012.

SEND YOUR RESUME
ABOUT TECKPATH

Create a world that inspires human connection and business growth. Every day at TeckPath, you connect organizations with the technology that makes them more agile — and the security that lets them focus on what they do best.

JOIN OUR TEAM

We are always looking for talented people who care about outcomes, not tickets. Whether you work in the field, on the help desk, in security operations, or with clients on strategy, you will be part of a team that treats IT as a business enabler — not a cost centre.

TeckPath is based in Calgary and Toronto and supports clients across Canada. If you thrive in a fast-moving MSP/MSSP environment and want your work to matter, we would like to hear from you.

WHAT WE LOOK FOR
Curiosity about how businesses actually run — not just how systems are configured
Clear communication with clients and teammates
A security-first mindset, even when the task is operational
Ownership: you follow
